member.name: T:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AgeRestrictionMode
member.summary: Defines the age restriction for a check-in configuration. This applies a filter when considering which people can be listed on the family member selection screen. Using one of the Hide modes will hide those people from the screen even if there is a valid opportunity for them to check into.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AgeRestrictionMode.ShowAll
member.summary: All ages will be shown.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AgeRestrictionMode.HideAdults
member.summary: Adults will not be shown or available for check-in.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AgeRestrictionMode.HideChildren
member.summary: Children will not be shown or available for check-in.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.GradeAndAgeMatchingMode
member.summary: Determines how the Grade and Age matching logic will work in check-in. This only affects the Grade Range, Age Range and Birthdate Range values for groups. Other filtering options are not affected.

summary.para: The grade and age must both match (assuming both are specified on the group).

If a group has a Grade Range, Age Range and Birthdate Range then the logic is: Grade must match and one of age or birthdate must match. Basically, the Grade filter runs, and then after it finishes the Age filter runs (which checks both age and birthdate).

If a Grade Range is specified on the group and the person has a matching Grade, then that will be considered sufficient and neither Age Range nor Birthdate Range will be checked even if they are specified.
If a Grade Range is not specified but Age Range or Birthdate Range are specified, then one of either Age Range or Birthdate Range must match the person's age.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.GradeAndAgeMatchingMode.PrioritizeGradeOverAge
member.summary: The same per-group filtering logic as is performed. After all groups have been filtered, if any of those matching groups were matched by Grade Range then they will take priority over all other matching groups. The other groups that did not match by grade will then be removed from the opportunity list.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.LocationSelectionStrategy
member.summary: If a group has more than one available location how should one be selected. Choosing an option other than "Ask" will auto select a location for the attendee.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.LocationSelectionStrategy.Ask
member.summary: The Ask strategy will present a list of rooms to the user so they can select one. This is the default behavior.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.LocationSelectionStrategy.Balance
member.summary: The balance strategy will attempt to fill all locations with an equal number of persons up to the soft threshold.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.LocationSelectionStrategy.FillInOrder
member.summary: The Fill In Order strategy will fill in the locations in a group in their sort order. When the location's soft threshold is reached the next one is used untill it fills up.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AbilityLevelDeterminationMode
member.summary: The way the ability level will be asked of the individual during the check-in process.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AbilityLevelDeterminationMode.Ask
member.summary: The individual will be asked as a part of each check-in.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AbilityLevelDeterminationMode.DoNotAsk
member.summary: Never ask for an ability level during check-in.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AbilityLevelDeterminationMode.DoNotAskIfThereIsNoAbilityLevel
member.summary: Only ask for an ability level if they don't already have one on file. This lets them update an ability level but not set it initially.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AbilityLevelDeterminationMode.DoNotAskIfThereIsAnAbilityLevel
member.summary: Only ask for an ability level if they already have one on file. This lets them set an initial ability level but not update one.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.CheckIn.AlreadyEnrolledMatchingLogic.PreferEnrolledGroups

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Cms.SiteTypeFlags
member.summary: Flags for the . This enum was introduced with the motivation to improve performance. Prior to this, reflection was the only way to get the SiteTypes on a BlockType which turned out to be expensive. With this enum, the computed SiteTypes could be stored in the database to be read later. The developer should ensure that the values in this enum is in sync with the ones in enum.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Blocks.Group.Scheduling.UpdateSchedulePreferenceMode.ReplacePreference
member.summary:
Removes other group preferences while adding or updating the current schedule preference.
"Other" is defined as any preference belonging to this group member, but not tied to the same schedule instance.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Blocks.Group.Scheduling.UpdateSchedulePreferenceMode.AddToPreference
member.summary:

"Other" is defined as any preference belonging to this group member, but not tied to the same schedule instance.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.BooleanFilterMethod
member.summary: The filtering method to use for a boolean filter column filter.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.BooleanFilterMethod.All
member.summary: All values will be shown.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.BooleanFilterMethod.No
member.summary: The value of the cell must be false.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.BooleanFilterMethod.Yes
member.summary: The value of the cell must be true.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod
member.summary: The filtering method used for a date filter column filter.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.Equals
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must match the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.DoesNotEqual
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must not match the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.Before
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be less than the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.After
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.Between
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the lower filter value and less than or equal to the upper filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.ThisWeek
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of this week and less than or equal to the last day of this week.

remarks.para: The start of the week defaults to Monday but can be changed in the System Configuration.
If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 3/13/2023 && cellDate <= 3/19/2023

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.LastWeek
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of the previous week and less than or equal to the last day of the previous week.

remarks.para: The start of the week defaults to Monday but can be changed in the System Configuration.
If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 3/6/2023 && cellDate <= 3/12/2023

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.NextWeek
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of the next week and less than or equal to the last day of the next week.

remarks.para: The start of the week defaults to Monday but can be changed in the System Configuration.
If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 3/20/2023 && cellDate <= 3/26/2023

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.ThisMonth
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of this month and less than or equal to the last day of this month.
member.remarks: If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 3/1/2023 && cellDate <= 3/31/2023

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.LastMonth
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of the previous month and less than or equal to the last day of the previous month.
member.remarks: If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 2/1/2023 && cellDate <= 2/28/2023

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.NextMonth
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of the next month and less than or equal to the last day of the next month.
member.remarks: If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 4/1/2023 && cellDate <= 4/30/2023

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.ThisYear
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of this year and less than or equal to the last day of this year.
member.remarks: If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 1/1/2023 && cellDate <= 12/31/2023

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.LastYear
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of the previous year and less than or equal to the last day of the previous year.
member.remarks: If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 1/1/2022 && cellDate <= 12/31/2022

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.NextYear
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of the next year and less than or equal to the last day of the next year.
member.remarks: If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 1/1/2024 && cellDate <= 12/31/2024

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.DateFilterMethod.YearToDate
member.summary: The date portion of the cell value must be greater than or equal to the first day of this year and less than or equal to today.
member.remarks: If today is Wednesday 3/15/2023, then this check would be: cellDate >= 1/1/2023 && cellDate <= 3/15/2023

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod
member.summary: The filtering method used for a number column filter.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.Equals
member.summary: The cell value must exactly match the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.DoesNotEqual
member.summary: The cell value must not match the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.GreaterThan
member.summary: The cell value must be greater than the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.GreaterThanOrEqual
member.summary: The cell value must be greater than or equal to the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.LessThan
member.summary: The cell value must be less than the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.LessThanOrEqual
member.summary: The cell value must be less than or equal to the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.Between
member.summary: The cell value must be greater than or equal to the lower filter value and less than or equal to the upper filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.TopN
member.summary: The cell value must be in the top N values.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.AboveAverage
member.summary: The cell value must be above the calculated average value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.NumberFilterMethod.BelowAverage
member.summary: The cell value must be below the calculate average value.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.PickExistingFilterMethod
member.summary: The filtering method used by the pick existing filter.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.PickExistingFilterMethod.Any
member.summary: The cell value must match any of the selected filter values.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.PickExistingFilterMethod.Exclude
member.summary: The cell value must not match any of the selected filter values.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.TextFilterMethod
member.summary: The filtering method used for a text column filter.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.TextFilterMethod.StartsWith
member.summary: The case-insensitive cell value must start with the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.TextFilterMethod.Contains
member.summary: The case-insensitive cell value must contain the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.TextFilterMethod.DoesNotContain
member.summary: The case-insensitive cell value must not contain the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.TextFilterMethod.EndsWith
member.summary: The case-insensitive cell value must end with the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.TextFilterMethod.Equals
member.summary: The case-insensitive cell value must equal the filter value.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Core.Grid.TextFilterMethod.DoesNotEqual
member.summary: The case-insensitive cell value must not equal the filter value.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Event.AttendanceStatus

member.summary: The individual did not attend and is not present in the room.

member.summary: The individual did attend but may not be present in the room.

member.summary: The individual did attend and is currently present in the room.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Event.CheckInStatus
member.summary: The check-in status of an Attendance record.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.CheckInStatus.Unknown
member.summary: The state is unknown.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.CheckInStatus.Pending
member.summary: The attendance record has been written but not finalized. This indicates that a spot in the room has been reserved but the check-in is still in progress.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.CheckInStatus.NotPresent
member.summary: The check-in process has been completed but the individual has not reached the room yet.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.CheckInStatus.Present
member.summary: The individual is now present in the room.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.CheckInStatus.CheckedOut
member.summary: The individual has been checked out and is no longer in the room.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.InteractiveExperienceApprovalStatus.Rejected
member.summary: Answer has been rejected by a moderator.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Event.InteractiveExperienceCampusBehavior
member.summary: Determines how campus usage behaves for the interactive experience.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.InteractiveExperienceCampusBehavior.FilterSchedulesByCampusGeofences
member.summary: The individual's geolocation is used to determine which campus geofence they are within. This will be used to filter the schedules and determine which campus to write to the Interaction. If a schedule has a campus without a geofence defined then it will always be excluded from the list of occurrences.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.InteractiveExperienceCampusBehavior.DetermineCampusFromGeofence
member.summary: The individual's geolocation is only used to determine the campus to be written on the Interaction. If no geolocation is available or it does not match any campus geofence then null (or the default experience campus) will be written on the Interaction.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.InteractiveExperienceCampusBehavior.UseIndividualsCampus
member.summary: The individual's campus associated with their record will be used only for determining which campus to write to the Interaction. If no campus is associated with the Person record then the default experience campus will be used.

member.name: T:Rock.Enums.Event.InteractiveExperiencePushNotificationType
member.summary: Represents the type of push notification to use for the Interactive Experience system when posting questions.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.InteractiveExperiencePushNotificationType.Never
member.summary: A push notification is never sent when a question is posted.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.InteractiveExperiencePushNotificationType.EveryAction
member.summary: A push notification is always sent when a question is posted.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Event.InteractiveExperiencePushNotificationType.SpecificActions
member.summary: The moderator decides if the push notification should be sent when they post a question.

member.summary: No SameSite field will be set, the client should follow its default cookie policy.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Net.CookieSameSiteMode.None
member.summary: Indicates the client should disable same-site restrictions.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Net.CookieSameSiteMode.Lax
member.summary: Indicates the client should send the cookie with "same-site" requests, and with "cross-site" top-level navigations.

member.name: F:Rock.Enums.Net.CookieSameSiteMode.Strict
member.summary: Indicates the client should only send the cookie with "same-site" requests.
